# AUTOGENERATED DIRECTORY - DO NOT EDIT

This `ontology/` directory is **automatically synced** from the
[repolex-ai/ontology-builder](https://github.com/repolex-ai/ontology-builder) repo.

**Do not create or edit files here directly.** Any changes will be
overwritten the next time `tools/sync_ontology.sh` is run.

To make changes:
1. Edit the source files in `ontology-builder/`
2. Run `tools/build_all.sh` to regenerate
3. Run `tools/sync_ontology.sh` to sync here
